description: Beneath the surface where sunlight is a memory. Caverns, tunnels, ruins, and stranger places carved by water, fire, or hands long forgotten.
locations: A natural stone arch spans a chasm, worn smooth by centuries of crossing. It is narrow and has no railing. The wind from below tugs at balance.
Frayed rope and weathered planks stretch across the dark. The bridge sways with each step, groaning. It has held so far, but the knots are old.
